title: iberis extensa
intro: Iberis extensa, also known as Candytuft, is a flowering plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Iberis extensa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
